response.justification: Bogdan presents a highly relevant profile with current experience in AI-agent infrastructure and extensive background in designing distributed, high-throughput systems. Their Staff Software Engineer title and diverse technical background align well with the seniority and technical depth required. The main concern is the complete absence of Python experience, which is listed as a 'must-have' for the role.
strengths: Current hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and code generators.
Proven expertise in building and scaling high-throughput, distributed systems.
Broad technical skill set and 'software craftsmanship' mindset across diverse domains.
concerns: No mention of Python, a 'must-have' technical skill for the role.
No explicit mention of participation in out-of-hours on-call rotations.
While Agile experience is present, the specific 'scrum champion' role isn't detailed.
